Nora
Home Team Nora AI Legal Dashboard

Moderation & AI
Built for Trust

Nora is a modern Discord moderation and AI assistant bot designed around one simple rule: server data belongs to the server that created it. No hidden logging. No developer access to private content. Communities stay in control.

Install Vote on Top.gg

Our Standards

Privacy by Default

Nora is built so server content is never accessible to developers. All data remains isolated securely within your own environment.

Transparent Systems

Every feature is designed so administrators understand exactly what data exists and how it is used. Total transparency.

Prioritized Moderation

Moderation tools prioritize reliability and clarity so staff can act quickly and confidently against raids and spam.

Example Commands

/configure

Full control over features, logging, and AI selection.

/ban

Permanently remove disruptive members from your server.

/mute

Apply temporary restrictions with clear time limits.

/ask

Ask Nora AI questions directly inside Discord.

/info

View or delete stored data instantly.

/invite

Create an invite for your server quickly and efficiently.

/leaderboard

View public leveling statistics and ranking.

/rank

View server rank and current XP.

/role

Quickly add a role to a user.

Latest Nora Updates

High-Security Practice

A major security-focused update introducing safer user practices, advanced protection systems, and the official release of Nora Studio Manager.

  • Security Enhancements: Strengthened privacy-first data handling, safer defaults, and expanded audit logging.
  • Suspicious Behavior Detection: Improved internal checks to prevent abuse and compromised account risks.
  • Nora Studio Manager: Fully released with true live database synchronization and telemetry.
  • Anti-Raid Shield: New automated raid-prevention layer to block mass-join attacks.
  • Discord AutoMod Integration: Native filtering and rule enforcement powered by Discord's latest moderation systems.

Aura Neural Engine

Nora now supports dynamic switching between three intelligent engines: Gemini 1.5 Flash, GPT-4o Mini, and our Local Privacy Core (Qwen 1.8B) which runs 100% on bare metal.
